resources.string:
What is Secure Tunnel?
Secure Tunnel encrypts and routes your internet connection through a secure remote server. This helps you browse privately and access blocked websites and apps.
Option A: Android VPN Mode (Recommended)
• How it works: Redirects your entire device internet traffic automatically.
• Setup: Set Capture Mode to Android VPN, enter your Server IP/Port, and tap Connect Tunnel. Accept the connection request when prompted.
Option B: Localhost Proxy Mode
• How it works: Starts a local proxy server inside this app.
• Setup: Set Capture Mode to Local Proxy, tap Connect Tunnel, then manually configure specific apps (like browsers, Telegram, or system Wi-Fi) to route via:
   • Proxy Server: 127.0.0.1
   • Port: (Your configured Local Proxy Port, e.g. 19088)
Important Details:
• Insecure Mode: Keep checked if your server uses a self-signed development security certificate. Uncheck if you are using public certificates.
